nasb.text: They rose early in the morning, and the sun shone on the water, and the Moabites saw the water opposite them as red as blood.

esv.text: And when they rose early in the morning and the sun shone on the water, the Moabites saw the water opposite them as red as blood.

cnv.text: 第二天早上，他們起來的時候，太陽照在水上，摩押人從那邊看見水紅得像血一樣。

ccb.text: 第二天早晨，日光照在水面上，摩押人起来后，看见对面的水像血一样红，
